ShortDescription.Value: Fast Bikes, Scooters, and Path Speeds :)

Publish.LongDescription:
🚲 Fast Bikes: speeds up bicycles and scooters.
🚴 NEW: Path speed limit - YES - now you can change bike paths (paths are independent of road speed limits)! 🚴 NEW: Status report - compare Bike versus Cars usage (this can be used without enabling Fast Bikes checkbox).
- road mods don't let you set "path" speeds so this is unique to this mod.
#### Features
- ✅ Speed ⬆️ ⬇️ - ✅ Smoothing math for acceleration + braking (no teleport and panic braking) - ✅ Optional stability tuning (affects swaying) - ✅ One-click Reset buttons.
#### Tech notes
- Road speed limits and game conditions may still cap speeds. - Compatible with "Road Speed Adjuster" mod (as that does normal roads and not paths). - Path speed limit: includes both bike and pedestrian paths. - To disable the mod without uninstalling, uncheck [ ] the enable box. - Safe to remove (Reset button first for fast return to game defaults, then save city, and uninstall). - Has 11 Languages
#### Support and Feedback
- If the mod helps, drop a Like, it's free + easy to do :) - Report issues on Github / Forum / Discord.
#### Design + Performance - FB is designed for the best city performance, it's partly why I made this mod. - I don't like to have a lot of mods that are running constantly in the city per frame when it's not needed to do certain things (like bike or path speed). - It updates tuning when you change a setting (or when a city loads), then goes idle. The Status report only refreshes when the Options menu is actually open. - FB doesn't run constantly while in the city. Some mods do it and might not need to if they were designed differently. And some mods must run constantly per frame due to the nature what they do. - This is a brief idea, there is much more of course; be sure, effort is made for this.
#### Credits
- **River-mochi** - author
tags: slow bike, bicycle speed, fix bike traffic, scooter, quality of life, change path speed, bike path.
